_recording_provenance.anchor_for: KPI 3 — data fidelity invariant (no client-side smoothing, interpolation, aggregation)
_recording_provenance.regeneration_note: This fixture is the controlled NaN-bearing anchor for the KPI 3 byte-equality test in apps/prism/tests/invariant-fidelity.test.ts. The five values (1, NaN, 3, NaN, 5) are deliberately chosen so any client-side smoothing or interpolation across the NaN gaps is structurally detectable. DO NOT regenerate this fixture from a real Prometheus — its NaN distribution is the test's discriminator. See docs/feature/prism-v0/distill/wave-decisions.md > D15.
